agents.listDescription: Every AI agent you've created. Each agent has its own persona, services list, and (soon) connector setup.
agents.vapiStatusDescription: Status of the env vars required to place AI calls.
agents.emptyDescription: Create your first agent and configure its persona, services, and channel connectors.

new.title: Create a new agent
new.description: Define the agent: name, voice persona, and services it can offer. Channel connectors come next.
new.formDescription: All fields are stored under your business only. You can edit them at any time.
new.nameHelp: Internal name for identifying the agent. Customers won't see it directly.
new.personaPlaceholder: Example: A polite, focused agent that books consultations for an aesthetics clinic. Asks medical screening questions gently, proposes available slots, and escalates discount requests to the business owner.
new.personaHelp: Free-form description, 20+ characters. Goes directly into the agent's system prompt.
new.servicesPlaceholder: Example: Initial consultation (₪350), laser treatment, lip fillers. Include prices, duration, and conditions where useful.
new.servicesHelp: Injected into the prompt so the agent can answer service and pricing questions.
new.genericError: Something went wrong while creating the agent. Please try again.

detail.servicesDescription: This text is injected into the agent's system prompt on every call.

connections.title: Connections
connections.description: Channels supported soon. Today the agent runs on the Vapi voice channel only.

login.title: Sign in to BusyAI
login.description: We'll email you a one-time sign-in link. Click it to land in the dashboard.
login.sentMessage: Check your inbox. The link is valid for a limited time.
login.genericError: Something went wrong while sending the link. Please try again.

brand.title: Smart Sales Dashboard
brand.subtitle: Hebrew-first CRM with a voice sales agent foundation

sidebar.quickStatusBody: MVP is live: AI sales agent flow with server-side Vapi wiring.

dashboard.title: Good morning, here is your business snapshot
dashboard.description: A first RTL dashboard for LeadPilot AI with clean mock data for the next phases.
dashboard.leadOverviewDescription: Customers that need attention in the current sales cycle.
dashboard.activityDescription: A quick look at AI call progress and follow-ups.

leadsPage.title: Lead management
leadsPage.description: A basic Hebrew-first leads table with statuses, ready for CRUD wiring later.
leadsPage.tableDescription: Initial mock view before database integration.

callsPage.title: AI calls log
callsPage.description: A monitoring screen for outbound AI calls backed by Supabase.
callsPage.tableDescription: Status, summary and transcript will appear here later.

agentPage.title: AI sales agent with Vapi
agentPage.description: Place live outbound calls to leads through Vapi. The API key and assistant stay server-side only.
agentPage.setupDescription: API key and assistant ID stay server-side. The browser triggers calls through a secure route.
agentPage.historyDescription: Previous AI calls stored in the system for monitoring.
agentPage.empty: No AI calls to display yet.

live.title: Live Vapi agent
live.description: Place a real phone call to a lead through Vapi. The call leaves from your configured Vapi number.
live.genericError: Something went wrong while starting the agent.

outbound.title: Outbound phone call
outbound.description: This button places a real phone call to a lead from your configured Vapi number.
outbound.phoneHelp: Use international E.164 format, for example +972501234567.
outbound.genericError: Something went wrong while starting the phone call.

calendarPage.title: Installations and deliveries calendar
calendarPage.description: A scheduling foundation for sales and operations teams.
calendarPage.agendaDescription: A mobile-first list view for the MVP.
calendarPage.summaryDescription: Quick view of availability and reservations.

productsPage.title: Products catalog
productsPage.description: Clean product cards ready for image_url, inventory and WhatsApp actions later.

settingsPage.title: System settings
settingsPage.description: A basic area for business settings and future automation setup.
settingsPage.businessDescription: Mock data for display only at this stage.
settingsPage.automationDescription: Key setup notes before real providers are connected.
settingsPage.automationItemOne: Voice agent: provider abstraction will arrive in later phases.
settingsPage.automationItemTwo: WhatsApp: we keep an abstraction before wiring Meta.
settingsPage.automationItemThree: Payments: secure payment links will land with a separate mock provider.
